Two years ago I had enough conviction that $RKLB could become the next generational compounder in my growth portfolio that I sized it at nearly 20% while it was still under $4.

It looks obvious now after a 25x move but back then it was a polarizing position since most people viewed Rocket Lab as “just another launch provider” with no chance against SpaceX while I saw the path toward becoming a full-spectrum space prime.

That is what conviction looks like when you do the work before the narrative catches up to the price.

One of the biggest misconceptions is still treating $RKLB like just a launch company when it has already become much more of a full-spectrum space prime.

Space Systems has made up ~70% of revenue since 2022 so this already looks more like the “FedEx of Space.”

Big Tech is reportedly offering to fund dedicated SK Hynix memory production lines and $ASML EUV purchases to secure chip supply.

Available capacity is “essentially zero right now” with some long-term agreements discussing 30%–40% upfront customer payments.

$RKLB and Raytheon were selected to demonstrate advanced capabilities for the U.S. Space Force’s Space Based Interceptor program.

The program is aimed at strengthening national missile defense capabilities through space-based intercept technology.

$YBST

Most investors can't get exposure to @AnthropicAI without venture capital access, accredited investor status, or a seat at the table during a fundraising round.

$AGIX invested directly in Anthropic on its capitalization table during a fundraising round, giving public market investors exposure to one of the most closely watched private AI companies ahead of a potential 2026 IPO.

AGIX also holds public companies that have made multi-billion dollar investments in Anthropic, including $AMZN, $MSFT, $GOOG, and $NVDA, creating layered exposure across the AI ecosystem.

Read our latest article on how AGIX invested in Anthropic and what it could mean for investors: rebrand.ly/323193

AGIX Top Ten Holdings: rebrand.ly/08aa82

The closure of the Strait of Hormuz exposed just how fragile fossil fuel dependence really is. As the energy transition accelerates, we believe energy storage is becoming the new oil reserve.
 
As oil majors did at the dawn of the petroleum age, we believe @catl_official has emerged as a dominant supplier of a key energy input.

With nearly 40% share of the global battery market, CATL is already the world’s largest battery supplier.

Average annual electricity consumption worldwide is expected to triple because of AI use cases. The only recent comparable event was the widespread adoption of air conditioning, but that only doubled electricity consumption, according to estimates.

The private credit market has never faced a real stress test.

We got the experts ( @UnicusResearch and @leadlagreport ) together to talk about what that means for investors.

Watch the replay - link below.
#webinar #privatecredit #finance #market #markets #investing

Bitcoin's most realistic bear case is an impossible situation.

The US government would have to reduce its $39 trillion debt pile, but policymakers have never managed to do that.

This makes the long-term thesis for $BTC bulletproof, as @DavidDziekanski explains.
